generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 2D obstacle detection and vehicle state metrics collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARRawData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for 3D spatial measurement and vehicle state metrics collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraRawData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for vehicle speed and steering angle metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler, ROS2, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance DepthCamera3DData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D spatial measurement data for spatial analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Propulsion control actuator for vehicle movement"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Directional adjustment actuator for steering"
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into voltage signals for physical actuators"
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for real-time communication and component integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing in Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance processing of sensor data and control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 for hardware acceleration and low-latency processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for modeling and simulation of ACC algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs point cloud clustering and tracking for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for high-performance edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for wireless communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays real-time vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks; enables data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataViewing, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system processing including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands from on-board ECUs to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to configure and control ADAS remotely by enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and sending emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance RealTimeDataViewing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data and object tracks"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save collected sensor and system data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate system reports based on collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detect lead vehicles using sensor data for ACC system"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculate appropriate speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate commands for motor and steering actuators based on ACC calculations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command to physical actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are serialized and translated via the Data Translation component, then transmitted over ROS2 for internal component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication to actuate motor and steering servo actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between physical and digital components due to hardware limitations, despite safety-critical vehicular standards mandating stricter synchronization (less than 100 ms) to ensure temporal consistency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An entity-based architecture mapped to ISO 23247 RA, where each entity (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) is deployed on dedicated hardware and coordinated via ROS2 packages and nodes. The Physical Twin Entity extends beyond standard OME to include general automotive functionality, ensuring seamless integration of sensors, actuators, and compute resources within the system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The standard specifies an entity-based reference architecture with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is supported through protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture for Functional Entity implementation."
]
